title: Toki Pona Translation Backport
description: A backport of the official toki pona translation to pre-1.17 Minecraft versions.
body:
Toki Pona Translation Backport is exactly what the name says: a backport of the toki pona translation to older versions of the game, from the official translation added in Minecraft 1.17.

This pack is not yet complete. Some aspects of the game, such as achievements, existed in older versions of the game, but were removed by 1.17. These aspects must be manually translated, and, as such, will take longer.

If there are any issues with the pack, please message me on Discord at @creepersneedhugs.
